parents.subject: LU-12514 obdclass: remove pointless struct lustre_mount_data2

commit.subject: LU-12514 obdclass: remove vfsmount option from client_fill_super
commit.message:
LU-12514 obdclass: remove vfsmount option from client_fill_super

This arg is always NULL and is never used.
So discard it from this and related functions.
